ExperimentCards
AIND · Ai2 · AutoDiscovery
Verdict
● PASSran successfully, clear result
● FLAGambiguous result, small N, or methodological concerns
Mech
M5direct causal test — manipulates and measures the mechanism
M4strong correlational evidence with controls
M3observational evidence consistent with mechanism
Novelty
T1fills an explicitly flagged gap (review paper said "not yet tested")
T2predicted but unmeasured in this circuit/task/species
T3validates existing framework in a new context
T4positive control — known finding re-observed
Contribution
Resolutioncloses the gap — same circuit, task, adequate N
Constraintnarrows the gap — borderline N or residual confounds remain
Replicationconfirms known finding in a new context
Negativenull result rules out a specific model prediction
